name: PolygonWeld
summary: The PolygonWeld class represents a polygon weld in the model. A polygon weld has a main part and a secondary part.

constructors.name: PolygonWeld
constructors.summary: Creates a new polygon weld instance.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares Identifiers of model objects.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the polygon weld instance with the given identifier from the model database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

params.name: other
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: true if object Identifiers are the same, false otherwise,

methods.name: GetAllReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetAllReportProperties(ArrayList stringNames, ArrayList doubleNames, ArrayList integerNames, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: stringNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the string properties.

params.name: doubleNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the double properties.

params.name: integerNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the integer properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table list that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetAllUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetChildren
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the children model objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns the coordinate system for the given model object.

returns.doc: The coordinate system for the given model object.

methods.name: GetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Gets custom object type name from an existing object.

returns.doc: Type name string, empty string if type is not set.

methods.name: GetDoubleReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleReportProperties(ArrayList names, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple double report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

params.name: names
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all double properties for the model object.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool GetDynamicStringProperty(string name, ref string value)
methods.summary: Gets a dynamic string property from the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: GetFatherComponent
methods.summary: Returns the father component of the model object.

returns.doc: A base component on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetHierarchicObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected hierarchic objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.summary: Retrieves all integer properties for the model object.

params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetLogicalWeld
methods.summary: Gets the logical weld where the weld belongs. Returns false if the weld does not belong to any logical weld.

params.name: LogicalWeld
params.doc: An initialized logical weld object.

returns.doc: True if the logical weld was selected correctly; false otherwise.

methods.name: GetPhase
methods.summary: Retrieves the phase of the model object (the phase number, the phase name, the phase comment and whether the phase is the current one or not).

params.name: phase
params.doc: The returned phase.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: GetSolid
methods.summary: Method for getting the weld solid.

returns.doc: Weld solid.

methods.name: GetWeldGeometries
methods.summary: Method for getting weld seam geometries. Every result represents one individual seam geometry in current weld.

returns.doc: An array list that contains weld seam specific WeldGeometry objects.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the polygon weld into the model database. All the attributes must be set.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the existing polygon weld in the model database to match the current one. The modification cannot be done if the polygon weld is a part of a logical weld.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects a polygon weld from the model database. The polygon weld identifier must be set.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Sets a custom object type name for an existing object.

params.name: type
params.doc: The custom obect type name to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool SetDynamicStringProperty(string name, string value)
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

params.name: label
params.doc: The label to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetPhase
methods.summary: Sets the phase of the model object.

params.name: phase
params.doc: The new phase. A phase with this phase's number must exist in the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetUserProperties
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperties(List<string> stringPropertyNames, List<string> stringValues, List<string> doublePropertyNames, List<double> doubleValues, List<string> intPropertyNames, List<int> intValues)
methods.summary: Sets multiple properties for the model object.

params.name: stringPropertyNames

params.name: doublePropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the double properties to be set.

params.doc: The new values for the double properties.

params.name: intPropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the int properties to be set.

params.name: intValues
params.doc: The new values for the int properties.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

properties.name: AdditionalSizeAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the additional size above for combination welds.

properties.name: AdditionalSizeBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the additional size below for combination welds.

properties.name: AngleAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the angle above.

properties.name: AngleBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the angle below.

properties.name: AroundWeld
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the weld is an around weld (true) or an edge weld (false).

properties.name: ConnectAssemblies
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to connect a part or an assembly as a secondary part (false) or as a sub-assembly (true).

properties.name: ContourAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the contour above.

properties.name: ContourBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the contour below.

properties.name: EffectiveThroatAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the effective throat above.

properties.name: EffectiveThroatBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the effective throat below.

properties.name: ElectrodeClassification
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld electrode classification.

properties.name: ElectrodeCoefficient
properties.summary: Gets or sets the electrode strength coefficient.

properties.name: ElectrodeStrength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the electrode strength.

properties.name: FinishAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the finish above.

properties.name: FinishBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the finish below.

properties.name: Identifier
properties.summary: The identifier of the object.

properties.name: IncrementAmountAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the increment amount above.

properties.name: IncrementAmountBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the increment amount below.

properties.name: IntermittentType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld intermittent type.

properties.name: IsUpToDate
properties.summary: Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.

properties.name: LengthAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the length above.

properties.name: LengthBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the length below.

properties.name: MainObject
properties.summary: Gets or sets the main part of the weld.

properties.name: ModificationTime
properties.summary: Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
properties.remarks: The returned time is time of history revision which the object belongs to. For Sharing it is WriteOut time, for multiuser is save time. If history it not written then this method returns null.

properties.name: NDTInspection
properties.summary: Gets or sets the NDT inspection level.

properties.name: PitchAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the pitch above.

properties.name: PitchBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the pitch below.

properties.name: Placement
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld placement.

properties.name: Polygon
properties.summary: The polygon for the polygon weld.

properties.name: PrefixAboveLine
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size prefix above the line.

properties.name: PrefixBelowLine
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size prefix below the line.

properties.name: Preparation
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld preparation.

properties.name: ProcessType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the process type.

properties.name: ReferenceText
properties.summary: Gets or sets the reference text.

properties.name: RootFaceAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the root face above.

properties.name: RootFaceBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the root face below.

properties.name: RootOpeningAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the root opening above.

properties.name: RootOpeningBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the root opening below.

properties.name: SecondaryObject
properties.summary: Gets or sets the secondary part of the weld.

properties.name: ShopWeld
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the weld is a shop weld (true) or a site weld (false).

properties.name: SizeAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size above.

properties.name: SizeBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size below.

properties.name: Standard
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld detail/standard.

properties.name: StitchWeld
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the weld is stitched (true) or not stitched (false).

properties.name: TypeAbove
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type above.

properties.name: TypeBelow
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type below.

properties.name: WeldNumber
properties.summary: Gets the weld number.

properties.name: WeldNumberPrefix
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld number prefix.
